zh.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Vernon於1427年出生在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，她的父親Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight44歲，母親Benedicta de Ludlow35歲。她於1442年與John Cokayne在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年在英國史洛普爾莫爾享年24歲。

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Vernon was born in 1427, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight, was 44 and her mother, Benedicta de Ludlow, was 35. She married John Cokayne in 1442, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1451, in More, Shropshire, England, at the age of 24.

Elle a épousé John Cokayne en 1442, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. ko.Ashborne Pooley, Derbyshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애쉬보우른 위스 마플레턴
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Vernon(이)가 1427년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Benedicta de Ludlow(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 John Cokayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 슈럽실르 모어에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Ashborne Pooley, Derbyshire, England: ашбурн вит маплетон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Vernon родилась в 1427 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Vernon, III, Knight было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Benedicta de Ludlow, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cokayne в 1442 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1451 г. в местности мор, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет.
